## Summary

Brief description of the change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Plugin / package
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on a fresh Ubuntu 22.04 server with `setup.sh`
- [ ] Backend API endpoints tested manually or with test scenarios
- [ ] Frontend UI tested in browser
- [ ] `deployment/SETUP.md` updated if the change affects setup steps

## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded IPs, credentials, or file paths
- [ ] `.env` file is not committed
- [ ] No new dependencies added without updating `requirements.txt` or `package.json`
